cat > ~/.config/systemd/user/litellm.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]

RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
Environment=HOME=/home/nugad
Environment=PATH=/home/nugad/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF

# Claude mode switcher

alias claude-cloud="claude-switch cloud"
alias claude-status="claude-switch status"
input.new_string:
# Claude mode switcher
claude-switch() {
  local LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"
  case "$1" in
    local)
      export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="$LITELLM_URL"
      export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-local-litellm"
      echo "[local]  Claude → LiteLLM proxy at $LITELLM_URL"
      echo "         Models: llama3.2, deepseek-coder, deepseek-r1, mistral, phi3.5"
      # verify proxy is up
      if ! curl -s --max-time 2 "$LITELLM_URL/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "[warn]   LiteLLM proxy not responding — start with: systemctl --user start litellm"
      fi
      ;;
    cloud)
      unset ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
      unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
      echo "[cloud]  Claude → Anthropic API (OAuth: seph_sky@yahoo.com)"
      ;;
    status)
      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
      if [ -n "$ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL" ]; then
        echo "Mode     : LOCAL"
        echo "Proxy    : $ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"
        echo "API Key  : $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"
        local health
        health=$(curl -s --max-time 2 "$ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/v1/models" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null)
        if echo "$health" | grep -q '"data"'; then
          echo "Proxy    : UP"
          echo "Models   : $(echo "$health" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)"
        else
          echo "Proxy    : DOWN (run: systemctl --user start litellm)"
        fi
      else
        echo "Mode     : CLOUD"
        echo "Account  : seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)"
        echo "Model    : claude-sonnet-4-6 (default)"
      fi
      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]"
      echo "  local  — route Claude Code to local LiteLLM/Ollama"
      echo "  cloud  — route Claude Code to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
      echo "  status — show current mode and proxy health"
      ;;
  esac
}
alias claude-local="claude-switch local"
alias claude-cloud="claude-switch cloud"
alias claude-status="claude-switch status"

HISTFILESIZE=2000

# If set, the pattern "**" used in a pathname expansion context will

#shopt -s globstar

    debian_chroot=$(cat /etc/debian_chroot)
fi

# set a fancy prompt (non-color, unless we know we "want" color)
case "$TERM" in
    xterm-color|*-256color) color_prompt=yes;;
esac

# uncomment for a colored prompt, if the terminal has the capability; turned
# off by default to not distract the user: the focus in a terminal window
# should be on the output of commands, not on the prompt
#force_color_prompt=yes

	# a case would tend to support setf rather than setaf.)
	color_prompt=yes
    else
	color_prompt=
    fi
fi

if [ "$color_prompt" = yes ]; then
    PS1='${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\[\033[01;32m\]\u@\h\[\033[00m\]:\[\033[01;34m\]\w\[\033[00m\]\$ '
else
    PS1='${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h:\w\$ '
fi
unset color_prompt force_color_prompt

# If this is an xterm set the title to user@host:dir
case "$TERM" in
xterm*|rxvt*)
    PS1="\[\e]0;${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h: \w\a\]$PS1"
    ;;
*)
    ;;
esac

# enable color support of ls and also add handy aliases
if [ -x /usr/bin/dircolors ]; then

    alias ls='ls --color=auto'
    #alias dir='dir --color=auto'
    #alias vdir='vdir --color=auto'

    alias grep='grep --color=auto'
    alias fgrep='fgrep --color=auto'
    alias egrep='egrep --color=auto'
fi

alias la='ls -A'

# Claude mode switcher
claude-switch() {
  local LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"
  case "$1" in
    local)
      export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="$LITELLM_URL"
      export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-local-litellm"
      echo "[local]  Claude → LiteLLM proxy at $LITELLM_URL"
      echo "         Models: llama3.2, deepseek-coder, deepseek-r1, mistral, phi3.5"
      # verify proxy is up
      if ! curl -s --max-time 2 "$LITELLM_URL/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "[warn]   LiteLLM proxy not responding — start with: systemctl --user start litellm"
      fi
      ;;
    cloud)
      unset ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
      unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
      echo "[cloud]  Claude → Anthropic API (OAuth: seph_sky@yahoo.com)"
      ;;
    status)
      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
      if [ -n "$ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL" ]; then
        echo "Mode     : LOCAL"
        echo "Proxy    : $ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"
        echo "API Key  : $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"
        local health
        health=$(curl -s --max-time 2 "$ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/v1/models" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null)
        if echo "$health" | grep -q '"data"'; then
          echo "Proxy    : UP"
          echo "Models   : $(echo "$health" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)"
        else
          echo "Proxy    : DOWN (run: systemctl --user start litellm)"
        fi
      else
        echo "Mode     : CLOUD"
        echo "Account  : seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)"
        echo "Model    : claude-sonnet-4-6 (default)"
      fi
      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]"
      echo "  local  — route Claude Code to local LiteLLM/Ollama"
      echo "  cloud  — route Claude Code to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
      echo "  status — show current mode and proxy health"
      ;;
  esac
}
alias claude-local="claude-switch local"
alias claude-cloud="claude-switch cloud"
alias claude-status="claude-switch status"

input.content:
# Claude Local/Cloud Setup

Run Claude Code against local Ollama models or Anthropic's cloud API, switchable per shell session.

---

## Architecture

```
Claude Code
    │
    ├── [cloud mode]  ──►  Anthropic API  (OAuth, seph_sky@yahoo.com)
    │
    └── [local mode]  ──►  LiteLLM proxy :4000  ──►  Ollama :11434
                                                          ├── llama3.2:3b
                                                          ├── phi3.5:3.8b
                                                          ├── deepseek-coder:6.7b
                                                          ├── deepseek-r1:7b
                                                          ├── mistral:7b
                                                          └── nomic-embed-text
```

---

## Quick Start

Open a terminal and source your shell config if needed:

```bash
source ~/.bashrc
```

### Switch to local models
```bash
claude-local
```
Sets `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000` and a local API key.
All Claude Code requests are routed to your local Ollama models.

### Switch to cloud (Anthropic)
```bash
claude-cloud
```
Unsets the local env vars. Claude Code falls back to your OAuth subscription.

### Check current mode
```bash
claude-status
```
Shows active mode, proxy health, and the list of available models.

---

## Local Models

| Proxy name | Ollama model | Size | Best for |
|------------|-------------|------|----------|
| `llama3.2` | llama3.2:3b | 2.0 GB | Fast general tasks |
| `phi3.5` | phi3.5:3.8b | 2.2 GB | Compact reasoning |
| `deepseek-coder` | deepseek-coder:6.7b | 3.8 GB | Code generation |
| `mistral` | mistral:7b | 4.1 GB | General purpose |
| `deepseek-r1` | deepseek-r1:7b | 4.7 GB | Step-by-step reasoning |
| `nomic-embed-text` | nomic-embed-text | 274 MB | Embeddings only |

### Claude name aliases (for API compatibility)
| Claude name | Maps to |
|-------------|---------|
| `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` | llama3.2:3b |
| `claude-sonnet-4-6` | deepseek-coder:6.7b |
| `claude-opus-4-6` | deepseek-r1:7b |

> **RAM note:** You have 7.4 GB RAM. Run one 7B model at a time.
> llama3.2:3b and phi3.5 can run alongside each other.

---

## LiteLLM Proxy

The proxy runs as a systemd user service on port 4000.

```bash
# Status
systemctl --user status litellm

# Start / stop / restart
systemctl --user start litellm
systemctl --user stop litellm
systemctl --user restart litellm

# View logs
journalctl --user -u litellm -f

# List registered models
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/models
```

Config file: `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml`
Service file: `~/.config/systemd/user/litellm.service`

---

## Calling models directly via API

The proxy exposes an OpenAI-compatible API. No auth key needed (local only).

```bash
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "deepseek-coder",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Write a Python hello world"}],
    "max_tokens": 200
  }'
```

---

## Adding a new model

1. Pull the model in Ollama:
   ```bash
   ollama pull <model-name>
   ```

2. Add an entry to `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml`:
   ```yaml
   - model_name: my-model
     litellm_params:
       model: ollama/<model-name>
       api_base: http://localhost:11434
   ```

3. Restart the proxy:
   ```bash
   systemctl --user restart litellm
   ```

---

## Removing a model

```bash
ollama rm <model-name>
```
Then remove its entry from `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml` and restart the proxy.

---

## Troubleshooting

**`claude-local` warns "proxy not responding"**
```bash
systemctl --user start litellm
# wait ~10s for startup, then retry
```

**Model responds slowly on first use**
Normal — Ollama loads the model into RAM on first request (cold start).
Subsequent requests are fast. 7B models typically take 5–15s to cold-start.

**Switching modes doesn't affect an already-running Claude Code session**
The env vars only apply to new Claude Code processes started in that shell.
Open a new terminal after switching, or restart Claude Code.

**Check what mode Claude Code is currently using**
```bash
echo ${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-"cloud (not set)"}
```

Sets `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000` and a local API key.
All Claude Code requests are routed to your local Ollama models.

### Switch to cloud (Anthropic)
```bash
claude-cloud
```
Unsets the local env vars. Claude Code falls back to your OAuth subscription.

### Check current mode
```bash
claude-status
```
Shows active mode, proxy health, and the list of available models.

---

## Local Models

| Proxy name | Ollama model | Size | Best for |
|------------|-------------|------|----------|
| `llama3.2` | llama3.2:3b | 2.0 GB | Fast general tasks |
| `phi3.5` | phi3.5:3.8b | 2.2 GB | Compact reasoning |
| `deepseek-coder` | deepseek-coder:6.7b | 3.8 GB | Code generation |
| `mistral` | mistral:7b | 4.1 GB | General purpose |
| `deepseek-r1` | deepseek-r1:7b | 4.7 GB | Step-by-step reasoning |
| `nomic-embed-text` | nomic-embed-text | 274 MB | Embeddings only |

### Claude name aliases (for API compatibility)
| Claude name | Maps to |
|-------------|---------|
| `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` | llama3.2:3b |
| `claude-sonnet-4-6` | deepseek-coder:6.7b |
| `claude-opus-4-6` | deepseek-r1:7b |

> **RAM note:** You have 7.4 GB RAM. Run one 7B model at a time.
> llama3.2:3b and phi3.5 can run alongside each other.

---

## LiteLLM Proxy

The proxy runs as a systemd user service on port 4000.

```bash
# Status
systemctl --user status litellm

# Start / stop / restart
systemctl --user start litellm
systemctl --user stop litellm
systemctl --user restart litellm

# View logs
journalctl --user -u litellm -f

# List registered models
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/models
```

Config file: `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml`
Service file: `~/.config/systemd/user/litellm.service`

---

## Calling models directly via API

The proxy exposes an OpenAI-compatible API. No auth key needed (local only).

```bash
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "deepseek-coder",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Write a Python hello world"}],
    "max_tokens": 200
  }'
```

---

## Adding a new model

1. Pull the model in Ollama:
   ```bash
   ollama pull <model-name>
   ```

2. Add an entry to `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml`:
   ```yaml
   - model_name: my-model
     litellm_params:
       model: ollama/<model-name>
       api_base: http://localhost:11434
   ```

3. Restart the proxy:
   ```bash
   systemctl --user restart litellm
   ```

---

## Removing a model

```bash
ollama rm <model-name>
```
Then remove its entry from `~/.claude/litellm_config.yaml` and restart the proxy.

---

## Troubleshooting

**`claude-local` warns "proxy not responding"**
```bash
systemctl --user start litellm
# wait ~10s for startup, then retry
```

**Model responds slowly on first use**
Normal — Ollama loads the model into RAM on first request (cold start).
Subsequent requests are fast. 7B models typically take 5–15s to cold-start.

**Switching modes doesn't affect an already-running Claude Code session**
The env vars only apply to new Claude Code processes started in that shell.
Open a new terminal after switching, or restart Claude Code.

**Check what mode Claude Code is currently using**
```bash
echo ${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-"cloud (not set)"}
```

#!/bin/bash
SETTINGS="/mnt/c/Users/nugad/.claude/settings.json"
LITELLM_CONFIG="$HOME/.claude/litellm_config.yaml"
LITELLM_PID_FILE="/tmp/litellm.pid"

GREEN='\033[92m'; CYAN='\033[96m'; YELLOW='\033[93m'
RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

current_mode() {
  grep -q "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL" "$SETTINGS" 2>/dev/null && echo "local" || echo "cloud"
}

litellm_running() { curl -s http://localhost:4000/health > /dev/null 2>&1; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 2
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed — is it installed?${RESET}\n  https://ollama.com"; exit 1; }
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama started${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ ! -f "$LITELLM_CONFIG" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude"
    cat > "$LITELLM_CONFIG" << 'YAML'
model_list:
  - model_name: deepseek-coder-6.7b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-coder:6.7b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
  - model_name: deepseek-r1-14b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-r1:14b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
  - model_name: deepseek-coder-33b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-coder:33b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
litellm_settings:
  master_key: sentinel-local
YAML
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM config created${RESET}"
  fi

  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    nohup litellm --config "$LITELLM_CONFIG" --port 4000 > /tmp/litellm.log 2>&1 &
    echo $! > "$LITELLM_PID_FILE"
    sleep 3
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: cat /tmp/litellm.log${RESET}"; exit 1; }
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM started on :4000${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running${RESET}"
  fi

  cat > "$SETTINGS" << 'EOF'
{
  "autoUpdatesChannel": "latest",
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "http://localhost:4000",
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "sentinel-local"
  }
}
EOF

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}✓ LOCAL mode active${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}claude --model deepseek-coder-6.7b${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}claude --model deepseek-r1-14b${RESET}\n"
}

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"
  if litellm_running; then
    [ -f "$LITELLM_PID_FILE" ] && kill "$(cat $LITELLM_PID_FILE)" 2>/dev/null || pkill -f litellm 2>/dev/null
    rm -f "$LITELLM_PID_FILE"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM stopped${RESET}"
  fi
  cat > "$SETTINGS" << 'EOF'
{
  "autoUpdatesChannel": "latest"
}
EOF
  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}✓ CLOUD mode active${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Claude Code → api.anthropic.com${RESET}\n"
}

show_status() {
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}Status${RESET}"
  mode=$(current_mode)
  [ "$mode" = "local" ] && echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}" || echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
  ollama_running  && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  litellm_running && echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"  || echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  echo ""
}

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud ;;
  status) show_status ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode\n"
    show_status ;;
esac

#!/bin/bash
# claude-switch — toggle Claude Code between local Ollama and Anthropic cloud
# Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]

SETTINGS="$HOME/.claude/settings.json"
LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"

GREEN='\033[92m'; CYAN='\033[96m'; YELLOW='\033[93m'
RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# ── helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

litellm_running() { curl -s --max-time 2 "$LITELLM_URL/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

current_mode() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    d = json.load(open('$SETTINGS'))
    print('local' if d.get('env', {}).get('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL') else 'cloud')
except:
    print('cloud')
"
}

# Safely set/remove keys in settings.json without touching other settings
settings_set_local() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
d.setdefault("env", {})
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"] = "http://localhost:4000"
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]  = "sk-local-litellm"
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

settings_set_cloud() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
env = d.get("env", {})
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", None)
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
if env:
    d["env"] = env
else:
    d.pop("env", None)
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

# ── local ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  # ensure ollama is up
  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 3
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed to start${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running :11434${RESET}"

  # ensure litellm service is up
  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    systemctl --user start litellm 2>/dev/null
    sleep 8
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: journalctl --user -u litellm${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running :4000${RESET}"

  # write env into settings.json (merge, don't overwrite)
  settings_set_local
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply\n"
  echo -e "  Available models:"
  curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
    | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print('    claude --model', m['id']) for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data'] if not m['id'].startswith('claude-')]" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
}

# ── cloud ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"

  settings_set_cloud
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  # leave litellm running (useful to keep warm), but stop it to save RAM if needed
  # systemctl --user stop litellm

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}CLOUD mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Account: seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)${RESET}\n"
}

# ── status ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

show_status() {
  mode=$(current_mode)
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}"
  if [ "$mode" = "local" ]; then
    echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Proxy     $LITELLM_URL"
  else
    echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Account   seph_sky@yahoo.com"
  fi

  ollama_running  \
    && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" \
    || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"

  if litellm_running; then
    models=$(curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
      | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Models    ${DIM}$models${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  fi

  echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}\n"
}

# ── dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local  ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud  ;;
  status) show_status   ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local Ollama models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode and service health\n"
    show_status ;;
esac

#!/bin/bash
SETTINGS="/mnt/c/Users/nugad/.claude/settings.json"
LITELLM_CONFIG="$HOME/.claude/litellm_config.yaml"
LITELLM_PID_FILE="/tmp/litellm.pid"

GREEN='\033[92m'; CYAN='\033[96m'; YELLOW='\033[93m'
RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

current_mode() {
  grep -q "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL" "$SETTINGS" 2>/dev/null && echo "local" || echo "cloud"
}

litellm_running() { curl -s http://localhost:4000/health > /dev/null 2>&1; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 2
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed — is it installed?${RESET}\n  https://ollama.com"; exit 1; }
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama started${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ ! -f "$LITELLM_CONFIG" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude"
    cat > "$LITELLM_CONFIG" << 'YAML'
model_list:
  - model_name: deepseek-coder-6.7b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-coder:6.7b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
  - model_name: deepseek-r1-14b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-r1:14b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
  - model_name: deepseek-coder-33b
    litellm_params:
      model: ollama/deepseek-coder:33b
      api_base: http://localhost:11434
litellm_settings:
  master_key: sentinel-local
YAML
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM config created${RESET}"
  fi

  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    nohup litellm --config "$LITELLM_CONFIG" --port 4000 > /tmp/litellm.log 2>&1 &
    echo $! > "$LITELLM_PID_FILE"
    sleep 3
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: cat /tmp/litellm.log${RESET}"; exit 1; }
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM started on :4000${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running${RESET}"
  fi

  cat > "$SETTINGS" << 'EOF'
{
  "autoUpdatesChannel": "latest",
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "http://localhost:4000",
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "sentinel-local"
  }
}
EOF

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}✓ LOCAL mode active${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}claude --model deepseek-coder-6.7b${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}claude --model deepseek-r1-14b${RESET}\n"
}

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"
  if litellm_running; then
    [ -f "$LITELLM_PID_FILE" ] && kill "$(cat $LITELLM_PID_FILE)" 2>/dev/null || pkill -f litellm 2>/dev/null
    rm -f "$LITELLM_PID_FILE"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM stopped${RESET}"
  fi
  cat > "$SETTINGS" << 'EOF'
{
  "autoUpdatesChannel": "latest"
}
EOF
  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}✓ CLOUD mode active${RESET}"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Claude Code → api.anthropic.com${RESET}\n"
}

show_status() {
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}Status${RESET}"
  mode=$(current_mode)
  [ "$mode" = "local" ] && echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}" || echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
  ollama_running  && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  litellm_running && echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"  || echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  echo ""
}

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud ;;
  status) show_status ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode\n"
    show_status ;;
esac

claude-switch() {
  local LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"

      ;;

      unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
      echo "[cloud]  Claude → Anthropic API (OAuth: seph_sky@yahoo.com)"
      ;;

      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

        local health
        health=$(curl -s --max-time 2 "$ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/v1/models" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null)

          echo "Proxy    : UP"
          echo "Models   : $(echo "$health" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)"
        else
          echo "Proxy    : DOWN (run: systemctl --user start litellm)"
        fi
      else
        echo "Mode     : CLOUD"
        echo "Account  : seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)"
        echo "Model    : claude-sonnet-4-6 (default)"
      fi
      echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]"
      echo "  local  — route Claude Code to local LiteLLM/Ollama"
      echo "  cloud  — route Claude Code to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
      echo "  status — show current mode and proxy health"
      ;;
  esac
}

alias claude-status="claude-switch status"

#!/bin/bash
# claude-switch — toggle Claude Code between local Ollama and Anthropic cloud
# Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]

SETTINGS="$HOME/.claude/settings.json"
LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"

GREEN='\033[92m'; CYAN='\033[96m'; YELLOW='\033[93m'
RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# ── helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

litellm_running() { curl -s --max-time 2 "$LITELLM_URL/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

current_mode() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    d = json.load(open('$SETTINGS'))
    print('local' if d.get('env', {}).get('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL') else 'cloud')
except:
    print('cloud')
"
}

# Safely set/remove keys in settings.json without touching other settings
settings_set_local() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
d.setdefault("env", {})
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"] = "http://localhost:4000"
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]  = "sk-local-litellm"
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

settings_set_cloud() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
env = d.get("env", {})
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", None)
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
if env:
    d["env"] = env
else:
    d.pop("env", None)
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

# ── local ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  # ensure ollama is up
  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 3
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed to start${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running :11434${RESET}"

  # ensure litellm service is up
  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    systemctl --user start litellm 2>/dev/null
    sleep 8
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: journalctl --user -u litellm${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running :4000${RESET}"

  # write env into settings.json (merge, don't overwrite)
  settings_set_local
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply\n"
  echo -e "  Available models:"
  curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
    | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print('    claude --model', m['id']) for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data'] if not m['id'].startswith('claude-')]" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
}

# ── cloud ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"

  settings_set_cloud
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  # leave litellm running (useful to keep warm), but stop it to save RAM if needed
  # systemctl --user stop litellm

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}CLOUD mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Account: seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)${RESET}\n"
}

# ── status ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

show_status() {
  mode=$(current_mode)
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}"
  if [ "$mode" = "local" ]; then
    echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Proxy     $LITELLM_URL"
  else
    echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Account   seph_sky@yahoo.com"
  fi

  ollama_running  \
    && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" \
    || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"

  if litellm_running; then
    models=$(curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
      | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Models    ${DIM}$models${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  fi

  echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}\n"
}

# ── dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local  ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud  ;;
  status) show_status   ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local Ollama models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode and service health\n"
    show_status ;;
esac

#!/bin/bash
# claude-switch — toggle Claude Code between local Ollama and Anthropic cloud
# Usage: claude-switch [local|cloud|status]

SETTINGS="$HOME/.claude/settings.json"
LITELLM_URL="http://localhost:4000"

GREEN='\033[92m'; CYAN='\033[96m'; YELLOW='\033[93m'
RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# ── helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

litellm_running() { curl -s --max-time 2 "$LITELLM_URL/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

current_mode() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    d = json.load(open('$SETTINGS'))
    print('local' if d.get('env', {}).get('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL') else 'cloud')
except:
    print('cloud')
"
}

# Safely set/remove keys in settings.json without touching other settings
settings_set_local() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
d.setdefault("env", {})
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"] = "http://localhost:4000"
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]  = "sk-local-litellm"
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

settings_set_cloud() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
env = d.get("env", {})
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", None)
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
if env:
    d["env"] = env
else:
    d.pop("env", None)
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

# ── local ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  # ensure ollama is up
  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 3
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed to start${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running :11434${RESET}"

  # ensure litellm service is up
  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    systemctl --user start litellm 2>/dev/null
    for i in $(seq 1 15); do
      sleep 2
      litellm_running && break
      echo -e "  ${DIM}waiting... ($((i*2))s)${RESET}"
    done
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: journalctl --user -u litellm${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running :4000${RESET}"

  # write env into settings.json (merge, don't overwrite)
  settings_set_local
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply\n"
  echo -e "  Available models:"
  curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
    | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print('    claude --model', m['id']) for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data'] if not m['id'].startswith('claude-')]" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
}

# ── cloud ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"

  settings_set_cloud
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  # leave litellm running (useful to keep warm), but stop it to save RAM if needed
  # systemctl --user stop litellm

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}CLOUD mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Account: seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)${RESET}\n"
}

# ── status ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

show_status() {
  mode=$(current_mode)
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}"
  if [ "$mode" = "local" ]; then
    echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Proxy     $LITELLM_URL"
  else
    echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Account   seph_sky@yahoo.com"
  fi

  ollama_running  \
    && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" \
    || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"

  if litellm_running; then
    models=$(curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
      | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Models    ${DIM}$models${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  fi

  echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}\n"
}

# ── dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local  ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud  ;;
  status) show_status   ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local Ollama models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode and service health\n"
    show_status ;;
esac

RED='\033[91m'; BOLD='\033[1m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# ── helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

litellm_running() { curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" | grep -q '"data"' 2>/dev/null; }
ollama_running()  { curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; }

current_mode() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    d = json.load(open('$SETTINGS'))
    print('local' if d.get('env', {}).get('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL') else 'cloud')
except:
    print('cloud')
"
}

# Safely set/remove keys in settings.json without touching other settings
settings_set_local() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
d.setdefault("env", {})
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"] = "http://localhost:4000"
d["env"]["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]  = "sk-local-litellm"
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

settings_set_cloud() {
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = "$SETTINGS"
try:
    d = json.load(open(path))
except:
    d = {}
env = d.get("env", {})
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", None)
env.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
if env:
    d["env"] = env
else:
    d.pop("env", None)
open(path, "w").write(json.dumps(d, indent=2) + "\n")
PY
}

# ── local ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_local() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to local models...${RESET}\n"

  # ensure ollama is up
  if ! ollama_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting Ollama...${RESET}"
    ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
    sleep 3
    ollama_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Ollama failed to start${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Ollama running :11434${RESET}"

  # ensure litellm service is up
  if ! litellm_running; then
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Starting LiteLLM...${RESET}"
    systemctl --user start litellm 2>/dev/null
    for i in $(seq 1 25); do
      sleep 2
      litellm_running && break
      [ $((i % 5)) -eq 0 ] && echo -e "  ${DIM}waiting... ($((i*2))s)${RESET}"
    done
    litellm_running || { echo -e "  ${RED}✗ LiteLLM failed — check: journalctl --user -u litellm${RESET}"; exit 1; }
  fi
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ LiteLLM running :4000${RESET}"

  # write env into settings.json (merge, don't overwrite)
  settings_set_local
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply\n"
  echo -e "  Available models:"
  curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
    | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print('    claude --model', m['id']) for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data'] if not m['id'].startswith('claude-')]" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
}

# ── cloud ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

switch_cloud() {
  echo -e "\n${CYAN}${BOLD}Switching to Anthropic cloud...${RESET}\n"

  settings_set_cloud
  echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ settings.json updated${RESET}"

  # leave litellm running (useful to keep warm), but stop it to save RAM if needed
  # systemctl --user stop litellm

  echo -e "\n  ${GREEN}${BOLD}CLOUD mode active${RESET} — restart Claude Code to apply"
  echo -e "  ${DIM}Account: seph_sky@yahoo.com (stripe_subscription)${RESET}\n"
}

# ── status ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

show_status() {
  mode=$(current_mode)
  echo -e "\n${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}"
  if [ "$mode" = "local" ]; then
    echo -e "  Mode      ${GREEN}${BOLD}LOCAL${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Proxy     $LITELLM_URL"
  else
    echo -e "  Mode      ${CYAN}${BOLD}CLOUD${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Account   seph_sky@yahoo.com"
  fi

  ollama_running  \
    && echo -e "  Ollama    ${GREEN}running :11434${RESET}" \
    || echo -e "  Ollama    ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"

  if litellm_running; then
    models=$(curl -s --max-time 3 "$LITELLM_URL/v1/models" \
      | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(', '.join(m['id'] for m in json.load(sys.stdin)['data']))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${GREEN}running :4000${RESET}"
    echo -e "  Models    ${DIM}$models${RESET}"
  else
    echo -e "  LiteLLM   ${DIM}stopped${RESET}"
  fi

  echo -e "${BOLD}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${RESET}\n"
}

# ── dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

case "${1:-}" in
  local)  switch_local  ;;
  cloud)  switch_cloud  ;;
  status) show_status   ;;
  *)
    echo -e "\n${BOLD}Usage:${RESET}"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-local${RESET}   switch to local Ollama models"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-cloud${RESET}   switch to Anthropic cloud (OAuth)"
    echo -e "  ${CYAN}claude-status${RESET}  show current mode and service health\n"
    show_status ;;
esac
